name: wc
description: World, line, character, and byte count

options.name: -c
options.description: Output the number of bytes to the standard input

options.name: -l
options.description: Output the number of lines to the standard input

options.name: -m
options.description: Output the number of characters to the standard input

options.name: -w
options.description: Output the number of words to the standard input
